description:
Configure Weasis display preferences for a classroom presentation with the currently loaded CT scan. Update the persistent settings to use 'Nearest Neighbor' for image interpolation, 'Best Fit' for the default zoom mode, and a font size of at least 16pt for overlays. Save a screenshot of the viewer to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_verification.png. Create a text file at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_changes.txt containing the following three lines (using your selected font size):
interpolation=nearest
zoom=bestfit
font_size=16
